list.name: Changes
list.comment:
Add IntelliJ project files and implement enhancements to tier & valuation engines
- Integrate fair price exception logic for "wonderful" businesses within 10% of target, considering a quality score threshold (B → A promotion with moat as margin of safety). - Refactor valuation to use weighted fair value averaging based on confidence levels. - Introduce a DCF-based fair value estimate and adjust P/E multiple valuation logic (18× fair P/E). - Improve Graham Number confidence scaling for asset-light businesses (adjust based on P/B ratio).

task.summary:
Add IntelliJ project files and implement enhancements to tier & valuation engines
- Integrate fair price exception logic for "wonderful" businesses within 10% of target, considering a quality score threshold (B → A promotion with moat as margin of safety). - Refactor valuation to use weighted fair value averaging based on confidence levels. - Introduce a DCF-based fair value estimate and adjust P/E multiple valuation logic (18× fair P/E). - Improve Graham Number confidence scaling for asset-light businesses (adjust based on P/B ratio).

MESSAGE.value:
Add IntelliJ project files and implement enhancements to tier & valuation engines
- Integrate fair price exception logic for "wonderful" businesses within 10% of target, considering a quality score threshold (B → A promotion with moat as margin of safety). - Refactor valuation to use weighted fair value averaging based on confidence levels. - Introduce a DCF-based fair value estimate and adjust P/E multiple valuation logic (18× fair P/E). - Improve Graham Number confidence scaling for asset-light businesses (adjust based on P/B ratio).

option.name: LAST_COMMIT_MESSAGE
option.value:
Add IntelliJ project files and implement enhancements to tier & valuation engines
- Integrate fair price exception logic for "wonderful" businesses within 10% of target, considering a quality score threshold (B → A promotion with moat as margin of safety). - Refactor valuation to use weighted fair value averaging based on confidence levels. - Introduce a DCF-based fair value estimate and adjust P/E multiple valuation logic (18× fair P/E). - Improve Graham Number confidence scaling for asset-light businesses (adjust based on P/B ratio).
